flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Dakota State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at South Dakota State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (41.5% → 46.0%).
